title: Joint targeted area inspections of the response to child sexual abuse in the family environment
body: "This guidance is for inspectors carrying out a JTAI of the multi-agency response to children who are victims of child sexual abuse in the family environment.  These JTAIs are carried out by inspectors from:   Ofsted the Care Quality Commission (CQC) His Majesty’s Inspectorate of Constabulary and Fire & Rescue Services (HMICFRS) His Majesty’s Inspectorate of Probation (HMIP)   "

taxons.title: Inspections of local authority children's services
